title: Environmental Health Specialist
description: Abbott Laboratories is seeking an Environmental Health Specialist to ensure safe and healthy environments in healthcare settings. You'll assess environmental risks, develop safety plans, and ensure regulatory compliance. Work hybrid in Phoenix for a leading global healthcare company.
responsibilities: Assess environmental health risks in healthcare facilities
Develop and implement environmental safety programs
Conduct training on environmental safety practices
Prepare documentation and reports on findings

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Environmental Health, Public Health, or related field
skills: Attention to detail and safety focus
